svg.title: UniBench — live model capability matrix
svg.desc: Animated ASCII capability matrix: coding, reasoning, agentic and long-context bars fill from benchmark data, then live route() calls assign tasks to the best agent: coding-agent 0.93, research-agent 0.91, codex-agent 0.89.
